title: tillandsia butzii
intro: Tillandsia butzii, a type of epiphytic air plant, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Bromeliaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Tillandsia butzii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
